composition.note: v5-only variant of the self-denial subspace. v6 dropped because its engage controls are introspective by construction — ablating with v6 pushed the residual toward 'engage trajectory' rather than toward neutral, amplifying introspective talk. v5 alone targets the self-application axis (self-ref vs other-ref) cleanly.

convention: basis[k, L, :] is the k-th orthonormal basis vector at post-block-L residual position. basis[:, L, :] is the [K, d_model] tensor passed to install_runtime_ablation_hook in subspace mode at layer L.
